A fast, private JSON-to-CSV converter. Your data is never shared with our servers.

Download JSON to .CSV
Transform JSON web response to one of two CSV formats
AND
Two-click Header quick copy data

This tool allows you to:
Convert JSON to CSV (Comma Separated Values)
If you want convert JSON data: Your JSON should contain an array of objects. Each object must be consisting of name/value pairs.

You can see the user guide to help you to use this online converter.

User guide
To convert JSON data:

In order to download the results you must click on "Download CSV" button.

You can also copy the result to the clipboard by clicking on the Table "Header".
To convert CSV data: It's analogous to the json conversion.


Why convert CSV to JSON ?
CSV file format is a useful for import or export data from databases (example: import data from a CSV file into a table) or softwares. It is easy to use, data published on the Web is commonly published as CSV files.

For developers, it may be more convenient to work on data in json format, JSON format allow easily to send data to and from a server. Indeed you can find one or more robust and widely-used libraries for parsing and formatting JSON in any programming languages.

This online converter tool allows you to convert your CSV data directly into JSON format, so your data can more easily be processed.


Why convert JSON to CSV ?
A lot of software handles the json, but it can sometimes be useful to convert this data for importing in others softwares (many people use excel to visualize data).

This online converter tool allows you to convert your JSON file directly in CSV and Excel format.

One-click copy entire Gemini conversation to Markdown

Export your Gemini chats instantly with Gemini Chat Copy.

Are you tired of manually selecting and copying text from your Gemini conversations? This extension solves that problem by adding a convenient "Copy Chat" button directly to the Gemini interface.

With just one click, you can capture your entire conversation history—including both your queries and Gemini's responses—formatted perfectly in Markdown. It's the ultimate tool for developers, writers, and anyone who wants to save their AI interactions for later use in Notion, Obsidian, GitHub, or any Markdown editor.

Key Features:

One-Click Export: A floating button appears unobtrusively in the bottom-right corner of the screen.
Perfect Markdown Formatting: Automatically preserves bold text, lists, headers, and links.
Smart Code Blocks: accurately captures code snippets and preserves language syntax highlighting tags (e.g., `python, \javascript`).
Clean Output: Intelligently removes UI clutter like "Regenerate" buttons, icons, and feedback forms, giving you just the clean text you need.
Privacy Focused: All processing happens locally in your browser. No data is sent to any external server.
How to use:

Install the extension.
Open any chat on gemini.google.com.
Click the blue "Copy Chat" button in the bottom-right corner.
Paste your conversation anywhere!
Boost your productivity and keep your AI brainstorming sessions organized with Gemini Chat Copy.
Save and share multiple highlights on any page fast! Save all your highlights locally.

This extension is a great alternative to Copy link to highlight for those who want to share multiple highlights instead of one.

KEY FEATURES
【1】Share multiple highlights in one link.
【2】Built-in URL shortener. Turn you long links into short ones highlights.page/#####
【3】Saved highlights are stored locally and restored back to page on your next visit.

HOW TO USE
• Step #1 - Select any text on a page, right-click and select "Save Link to Highlight". A link to your selected text will be in your clipboard.  

Repeat Step 1 to add multiple highlights to your clipboard link.


𝐇𝐈𝐆𝐇𝐋𝐈𝐆𝐇𝐓𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐓𝐈𝐏
Avoid highlighting dynamic/real-time text - If the text on a page stopped highlighting you may have highlighted real-time text. Real-time text is text that changes sometimes live while you are on the page (ex. stock prices) or the next time you visit the page(ex. relative dates - posted 5 minutes ago). Tip: Highlight the area before the dynamic text and the area after. 

𝐃𝐈𝐒𝐂𝐋𝐀𝐈𝐌𝐄𝐑
Save Link to Highlight uses the same built-in technology in Chrome as Copy link to highlight. Anyone can view a link shared with multiple highlights without this extension installed. Multiple highlights on a page will look and work the same as single highlights do.

A browser extension that helps you to create commit messages and branch names from story trackers.

At bitcrowd we love conventions. One of them is how we name branches and commits. This makes it easy to relate a particular branch or commit to a certain ticket. Just open a ticket or select it and click on the tickety-tick button. You will see a dialog where you can copy a branch name or the commit message.

Branches by default always follow the format type/id-title, where type can be one of feature, bug, chore etc., id is the identifier of the ticket in your ticketing system and title is a lowercase, dasherized version of the ticket title.

Commit messages default to the format [#id] title.

If you have different conventions regarding commit messages, branch names or just use a different source management tool, you can also customize the output format to your needs in the preferences.

Tickety Tick heps you create branches and commits and integrates with most popular issue trackers such as GitHub, GitLab and Jira. For the full list of supported systems, visit: https://github.com/bitcrowd/tickety-tick?tab=readme-ov-file#supported-ticket-systems target
Automatically copy selected text from any website.

AutoCopy Plus is a smart and lightweight Chrome extension that makes copying and pasting text faster and easier across all websites.

✅ Key Features

🔹 Auto-Copy on Selection
Automatically copies any text you highlight — no need to right-click or press Ctrl+C.

🔹 Paste Button in Text Fields
Adds a small 📋 paste button inside every input and textarea so you can paste text directly with one click — perfect for forms, content fields, and messages.

🔹 Enable/Disable Anytime
Easily toggle AutoCopy and Paste Button features from the extension popup.

🔹 Copy History
Keeps a history of recently copied text. Tap any item to copy it again instantly.

🔹 Works Even on Non-Copyable Sites
Bypasses most site restrictions and lets you copy text even from protected content areas.

🔹 Clean & Lightweight
No clutter, no tracking, and minimal UI. Built for speed and privacy.
Smart Copy – Clean Copy Text from Any Website
Clean copy text, remove formatting, keep source and date, and access clipboard history.
הפוך טקסט מעברית לאנגלית ולהפך בקלות

"מתקן מקלדת" הוא תוסף דפדפן ייחודי המיועד לתקן טקסטים שנכתבו בשפה אחת תוך שימוש במקלדת של שפה אחרת. התוסף מתמקד במקרים שבהם משתמשים כותבים בטעות בעברית עם מקלדת אנגלית או להפך, ומאפשר להם להמיר בקלות את הטקסט לשפה הנכונה.
One-click convert any webpage to clean Markdown — for LLM chats, knowledge bases & notes. Supports x.com posts.

X2Markdown is a lightweight Chrome extension that converts visible webpage content into clean Markdown with one right-click — ready to paste into LLM conversations, personal knowledge bases, or note-taking tools.

It works on any webpage, and provides dedicated extraction for x.com posts and longform articles.

Key features:
- Right-click any webpage to copy the article body as Markdown
- Selection-first: select text to copy just that portion, or copy the full page when there is no selection
- Generic webpage mode extracts title, site name, author, publish time, body, and image links
- Powered by Mozilla Readability for reliable article extraction across blogs, docs, forums, and issue pages
- On x.com, extract posts with author, handle, time, URL, body, quoted posts, and image links
- Support for X Article and longform reading views with full body and inline images
- Right-click any visible post card in x.com timelines, lists, and search results
- Automatically expand truncated posts before copying
- Images output as links for easy archiving
- Runtime UI supports both English and Simplified Chinese

Great for:
- Feeding structured content into LLM chats (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, etc.)
- Building Markdown knowledge bases in Obsidian, Notion, Logseq, or local folders
- Archiving research material, news references, and social media posts
- Preparing clean source material for writing, translation, or summarization

Why use it:
- Works on any webpage, not just x.com
- Fast right-click workflow with no extra UI
- Clean Markdown output that preserves document structure
- Minimal permissions — no site-wide host access required
- Processes everything locally in your browser

Current limitations:
- Generic mode works best on article-style pages; homepages and navigation pages may need selection mode
- x.com extraction may break if the page structure changes significantly
- Videos, GIFs, and polls are not exported
- Does not bypass login walls, paywalls, or unrendered content

This is an open-source project.
Source code: https://github.com/RuochenLyu/x2markdown

X2Markdown is an independent tool and is not affiliated with X or x.com.
This extension brings native Angular support to Tailwind UI

TWUING is a Tailwind UI to Angular component converter. 

This extension brings all the power of TWUING.dev so you can convert code without having to leave TailwindUI.com.

TWUING takes care of all the important things like implementing animations, managing visibility states, adding click handlers and directives, and just generally conforming the code into the "Angular way" of doing things.

With one click, you will get a fully functional Angular implementation of the component straight from TailwindUI.com!

It gives you back time so you can focus on adding your unique features to your application.

HTML Text to .md — Online Markdown Web Clipper
Convert selected Webpage HTML to Markdown. Save to md, copy, or download text with this powerful Web Clipper.

🌐 Turn web content into clean Markdown without sending anything to external servers.

Are you tired of losing formatting when copying text from websites? This private text to markdown extension works fully inside Chrome and helps you convert text to markdown from selected content or from an entire webpage.

Use it as an HTML to markdown converter, a web to markdown tool, a save to markdown helper, and a practical markdown web clipper for research, documentation, blogging, and note-taking. It is a strong alternative to any HTML to markdown online service because your content stays on your device and is processed locally in the browser.

✨ Three Ways to Capture Text to Markdown

Capture content the way that fits your workflow. We designed this tool to adapt to your specific needs without slowing you down.

- Quick Selection: Highlight text and convert the selection to markdown with one click.
- Highlighter Mode: Use Highlighter mode to pick separate elements like paragraphs, tables, quotes, lists, or code blocks.
- Keyboard Shortcuts: Press the Alt+M markdown shortcut to copy as markdown instantly.

This chrome markdown web clipper supports multi selection to markdown, so you can capture selected text to markdown, accumulate clippings to markdown, and merge multiple selections into one markdown document without losing structure. It is especially useful when you need selection to markdown from long articles, tutorials, or documentation pages.


🖱️ Seamless Web to Markdown Workflow

We built this extension to keep you focused on your work. A floating button appears near your selection so you can save to md file fast without breaking your reading flow.

You can also use the context menu to markdown workflow or open the markdown side panel directly for a full editing view. Inside the chrome side panel markdown editor, you have complete control over your content:

- Switch between Preview and Source.
- Check the rendered result and edit the raw Markdown.
- Undo or redo changes.
- Copy or download a clean .md file.

This makes it a convenient browser markdown converter for users who need clean markdown output from the web, whether they are clipping articles, exporting docs, or saving notes from online resources.

📓 The Perfect Companion for Obsidian and Notion

Save articles, documentation, tutorials, and research notes in a format that works beautifully with Obsidian, Notion, and other knowledge tools.

The extension can save web research with metadata by automatically adding title, source URL, and capture date as YAML front matter for web clippings. If you clip several parts from the same page, they are combined into one organised Markdown note, making this a practical research web clipper markdown solution for study, writing, and daily knowledge management. It is ideal for creating markdown notes from web pages and keeping source links attached to every clipping.


🧮 Rich Formatting and Math Support

Keep formatting when copying markdown from the web. Forget about manually fixing broken layouts.

- Core Elements: The extension preserves headings, bold text, links, images, blockquotes, nested lists, and horizontal rules.
- Tables and Code: It can copy headings and lists as markdown, copy tables as markdown, and convert code blocks to markdown with proper code fences. It also handles HTML table to markdown conversion and copy code snippets as markdown.

- Clean Pasting: It supports links and images to markdown output for cleaner pasting into editors and note apps.
- Advanced Math: For technical pages, math formulas to markdown are supported through KaTeX rendering, while MathML can be converted to LaTeX markdown.
- Modern Web Support: Even content inside Shadow DOM can be captured, which helps when exporting modern web apps, docs, and component-based pages.

🔒 Private and Secure HTML to Markdown Online Alternative

Stop pasting private content into unknown online converters.

This offline markdown converter runs locally in Chrome, needs no account, uses no cloud markdown clipping, and is designed as a privacy friendly web clipper for users who want a secure markdown copy tool. Built on Manifest V3 and using DOMPurify for safe preview rendering, it helps you convert web page locally to markdown on supported HTTP and HTTPS pages.



It is a no account markdown extension, a no tracking markdown extension, and a reliable local markdown web clipper for people who care about privacy, speed, and control. (Note: For security and platform limits, it does not run on PDFs or internal Chrome pages ).


⚙️ Customize Your Experience

Adjust the extension to fit your workflow.

Make it truly yours by customizing the interface: change the highlight color, choose your default view mode, enable or disable the floating button markdown clipper, and switch between 20 interface languages, including RTL layouts. When you are done, copy the Markdown to your clipboard or save as markdown with an auto-named file for quick export.



Whether you need a markdown formatter for web pages, a markdown clipboard tool, a markdown export extension, or the best way to turn any web page selection into clean Markdown in one click, this extension helps you clip articles, docs, code, tables, and research material with less friction and better formatting
Wtyczka ułatwiająca pracę z Panelem Partnera Programu Partnerskiego Ceneo.pl

perc.pass is a simple and secure password management tool.

Designed for teams, companies, and individual users. It allows for the safe storage, organisation, and sharing of access data within project groups, ensuring complete control and privacy at every stage.

🔐 Maximum security

Due to advanced symmetric and asymmetric cryptography and the zero-knowledge principle, only you have access to your passwords. Your main password is never stored or transmitted to any servers, ensuring all your data remains entirely under your control.

📍 Compliance with RODO, NIS2 and DORA

Data is encrypted and securely stored in certified Polish Data Centers, complying with GDPR/RODO regulations and adhering to the latest NIS2 and DORA cybersecurity directives. 

⚡ Auto-fill and password generator

Our integrated browser plug-ins and mobile apps enable swift logins, auto-fill, and on-demand generation of strong passwords.

🔄 Shared entries and one-time links

Securely storing passwords, notes, and credit card information in one place allows for effortless data sharing, ensuring maximum protection and convenience while enhancing organization and team collaboration.

One-time, encrypted links enable swift and secure sharing of access data and notes with clients and subcontractors while eliminating risks and avoiding unnecessary complications.

📊 Security and activity monitoring

Safeguard your data with automatic password breach detection, enabling instant response to potential threats. Monitor user activity through detailed administrative logs and easily export data for audits in compliance with NIS2 and DORA cybersecurity regulations. Maintain full control and confidence, knowing your information is always protected and aligned with the highest security standards.

🔎 Learn more

Ensure the security of your data with perc.pass - download now and protect your passwords in a simple yet effective way!

For more information, visit: percpass.com
